title: Vanilla Scented Candle in Glass Jar 2 Wicks Assorted Fragrance Home Decor Xmas Gift
features: Scented Candles In Glass Jar 3 Layers / 2 Wicks Assorted Fragrance Home Decor / Xmas Gift.
Candles in a square glass with a tricolour wax is a perfect solution for people who value functionality as well as modern design. Thanks to the two wicks, the flame of the candle is more intense.
Burning time up to 32 hours approx. (depends on ambient / outside factors).
Approximate weight: 170 g / Approximate size: 8.0 x 8.0 x 8.0 cm.
description: Product Description ✔️ PERFECT FOR HOME DECOR! Our classic candles are a perfect home decoration or element of interior design. Their warm flame will illuminate any room, creating a romantic aura. Candles will slowly melt until the end. It is an ideal decorative element. Decorative Household Candles - Scented - Clean Burn - Long Burning Time Burning Time: Up to 32 hours (depending on the ambient and outside factors). Size: Height: 8 cm / Base: 8 cm x 8 cm. Perfect for: Parties, Weddings, Restaurants, Home Decorations. Materials: Paraffin Wax, Cotton Wick, Glass. Vegan Friendly: YES (Paraffin Wax). IDEAL FOR: ✔️ Parties ✔️ Weddings ✔️ Restaurants ✔️ HIGHEST QUALITY Including our classic candles in interior design is a great way to create a unique atmosphere. Additionally, these candles can be burned alone or with several larger candles. This way we can create a well-styled room that everyone will love. Shining many of them simultaneously gives a very nice visual effect. ✔️ GREAT GIFT! The candles will be a great decoration for many interiors. It will find its place in the living room, hall or dining room. It will be perfect as a table decoration during any celebration, it will add style and elegance. It can be a perfect gift. Burn Time: Up to 32 hours (depending on the ambient and outside factors). Size: Height: 8 cm / Base: 8 cm x 8 cm. Perfect for: Parties, Weddings, Restaurants, Home Decorations. Paraffin Wax, Cotton Wick, Glass. VERSATILE! Our classic candles are available in various colours and scents! Everyone can find the best one to match the occasion and interior decoration. ✔️ WARM AND COSY ATMOSPHERE! Our candles' simple, classic appearance and the long burning time create an unforgettable atmosphere, making the odourless candles ideal as a decorative element of a home, hotel, office, banquet hall, massage salon, beauty salon, restaurant or other public space.
